
### heap overflow: adjacent allocations 

::::: {.columns}

:::: {.column}

```cpp
class V {
  char buffer[100];
public:
  virtual void ...;
  ...
};
...
V *first = new V(...);
V *second = new V(...);
strcpy(first->buffer,
       attacker_controlled);
```

::::

:::: {.column}

::: {.r-stack}
![](/overflow-heap/texfig/heap-adjacent.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-out fragment-index=2 height=450px}

![](/overflow-heap/texfig/heap-adjacent.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2 height=450px}

:::

::::

:::::
